You're eligible for Superior University if you meet these criteria:

• Minimum 12 years of education (FSc/O+A Levels)
• Minimum 50% marks in previous qualification
• Pakistani national (International students welcome with special admission)

📝 Entry Requirements:
• Valid CNIC or Passport
• Recent medical checkup (for hostel)

• Minimum age: 17 years

Superior University Anti-Ragging Policy:

🛡️ ZERO TOLERANCE POLICY:
Superior University maintains a STRICT zero-tolerance policy against ALL forms of ragging, bullying, and harassment. Violations result in IMMEDIATE disciplinary action up to expulsion.

⚠️ WHAT IS RAGGING?
Ragging includes:
✗ Physical abuse (hitting, forcing physical tasks)
✗ Verbal abuse (insulting, intimidating language)
✗ Humiliation (public embarrassment, forced acts)
✗ Psychological harassment (threats, intimidation)
✗ Sexual harassment (unwanted advances, comments)
✗ Financial exploitation (forcing money, theft)
✗ Any act causing distress or discomfort

✅ SAFE CAMPUS FEATURES:
• CCTV in common areas
• 24/7 security patrols
• Emergency hotline available
• Trained anti-ragging squad
• Confidential complaint system
• Quick response team
• Regular awareness programs
• Mentor-buddy system for freshers

⚙️ TROUBLESHOOTING:

PROBLEM: Can't find network
• SOLUTION: Make sure WiFi is enabled
• Restart: Restart device
• Forget: Forget network, connect again
• Try: Move closer to router

PROBLEM: Can't login
• SOLUTION: Check Student ID spelling
• Password: Verify CNIC + Date format
• Reset: Use "Forgot Password" option
• Clear: Clear browser cache/cookies

PROBLEM: Slow internet
• SOLUTION: Move closer to access point
• Restart: Turn WiFi off/on
• Check: Close unnecessary apps
• Time: Try during off-peak hours (2-4 AM)

PROBLEM: Connection drops
• SOLUTION: Update WiFi drivers
• Disconnect: Forget network, reconnect
• Restart: Restart modem/router
• Contact: Report to IT support

📱 MOBILE HOTSPOT:

• No mobile data? Ask IT for troubleshooting
• Backup: WiFi is primary network
